Bug / Task Description: The pytest suite does not pass on this snapshot. There are several independent defects in the graph library: a traversal helper in meridian/algorithms/traverse.py has a Python syntax error that breaks test collection; simple_cycles and cycle_basis in meridian/analysis/paths.py return incorrect or duplicate cycles (and can fail to terminate cleanly); and eigenvector_centrality in meridian/algorithms/centrality.py does not converge on bipartite graphs. Diagnose and fix the library so the full test suite passes, preserving existing public APIs, return types, and result semantics.
Commit Subject: Fix infinite loop in simple_cycles and duplicate cycles in cycle_basis
